untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tick-level microstructure data (offer-hit vs bid-hit ratios and consecutive trade sequences) which is not available in the allowed indicators. The signal depends on analyzing individual trade direction and momentum within a bar, not OHLCV candle data. No allowed indicator can directly measure buyer vs seller-motivated trade conviction or sustained directional trade flow.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using vol_ratio_20 (volume conviction) and adx_14 (trend strength) to approximate sustained directional momentum, but this does NOT capture the core signal requirement of analyzing bid/offer hitting patterns and trade-level conviction metrics. A proper implementation would require tick-by-tick or order flow data.
